feed.title: Lumi Studio — one independent iOS app guide daily
feed.subtitle: A low-frequency rotation across every currently public Lumi Studio app.

entry.title: Lumi Bopomofo Pro — independent iOS app guide
entry.content: Today's Lumi Studio app guide: Lumi Bopomofo Pro. Explore practical use cases and see whether it fits your needs before visiting the App Store. #iOSApps #IndieApps
entry.summary: Explore the public guide for Lumi Bopomofo Pro, with practical use cases and a direct App Store link.
